introSection: Shima Spain Village (志摩スペイン村) is a theme park in Shima, Mie Prefecture, Japan, opened in April 1994. As the name suggests, the theme park is dedicated exclusively to Spain.

sections.title: Parque España
sections.content: Parque España is the core theme park facility of Shima Spain Village.

sections.title: Hotel Shima Spain Village
sections.content: Hotel Shima Spain Village is a 252-room hotel.

sections.title: Himawari-no-Yu
sections.content: Himawari-no-Yu is a natural hot spring.

fullText:
Shima Spain Village (志摩スペイン村) is a theme park in Shima, Mie Prefecture, Japan, opened in April 1994. As the name suggests, the theme park is dedicated exclusively to Spain.



Parque España is the core theme park facility of Shima Spain Village.



Hotel Shima Spain Village is a 252-room hotel.

Himawari-no-Yu is a natural hot spring.
